name: nutritrack
description: NutriTrack — Free Health & Meal Tracking App

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let c=fs.readFileSync('js/config.js','utf8'); c=c.replace('https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co', process.env.SUPABASE_URL).replace('YOUR_ANON_KEY', process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY); fs.writeFileSync('js/config.js',c);"
